boards.title: Hero
boards.description: These are general AWESOME, evergreen photos of the brand -- like what we would  pull from to send in a PR deck. Criteria: Product looks amazing, retro vibes, timeless Your Brand. Can be Lifestyle, Studio, or UGC (also see "UGC Hero" for UGC only). Tag with "Brand Hero" as well. BE PICKY!

children.title: ShortsGrid
children.description: A condensed version and a more spread out version. If you use this png graphic then you can link it to the shorts collection page. If you'd prefer each short to be shoppable then feel free to use each individual short asset in figma to build the landing page out that way.
